title: Record emulator smoke test host blocker

preflight.note: Created before this documentation and evidence-hardening pass began.

acceptance_criteria.text: The emulator smoke-test attempt records SDK install success, AVD creation success, emulator launch crash, probable Windows graphics/backend blocker, and no phone writes.
The ROM lab has a dedicated emulator smoke-test report, crash-log index guidance, and updated status/plan documents.
Read-only host evidence capture and experimental safe emulator launch helper scripts are added without phone mutation commands.
Repository validation and ROM lab tests pass after the records are added.
No emulator crash database binaries, firmware, images, vendor blobs, archives, serials, IMEIs, unlock keys, local SDK files, or AVD disk images are committed.
No destructive or firmware-write action is performed on the physical phone.
